# המגנים של לורן — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A business focused on MMA (Mixed Martial Arts) protective gear and equipment. The brand operates in the combat sports and martial arts niche, catering to fighters and athletes who need quality protective equipment for training and competition.

## How to Contact Us

- Email: loren250814@gmail.com
- Phone: 0533816566
- Phone (tel): tel:0533816566
- Address: Ginat Egoz St, Pardes Hanna-Karkur, Defenders of Lauren , 24723, ישראל

### Contact form
- URL: https://hamaginim-shel-loren.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://hamaginim-shel-loren.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About המגנים של לורן
A business focused on MMA (Mixed Martial Arts) protective gear and equipment. The brand operates in the combat sports and martial arts niche, catering to fighters and athletes who need quality protective equipment for training and competition.

## Services/Products
- מגני MMA

## Target Audience
- צעירים המתאמנים ב-MMA
- הורים לילדים המתאמנים ב-MMA
- לוחמי MMA מקצועיים

## Industry
Sports Equipment & Martial Arts
